quote: A reader lives a thousand lives before he dies. The man who never reads lives only one.
author: George R.R. Martin

quote: Not all those who wander are lost.
author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quote: The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.
author: Chinese proverb

quote: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
author: Will Durant

quote: Curiosity is the beginning of every adventure.
author: Anonymous

quote: Kindness is a language the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
author: Mark Twain

quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
author: Socrates

quote: Books are a uniquely portable magic.
author: Stephen King

quote: It does not do to dwell on dreams and forget to live.
author: J.K. Rowling
source: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone

quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Laozi

quote: To love and be loved is to feel the sun from both sides.
author: David Viscott

quote: The unexamined life is not worth living.
author: Socrates

quote: Happiness can be found even in the darkest of times, if one only remembers to turn on the light.
author: J.K. Rowling
source: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

quote: It is our choices that show what we truly are, far more than our abilities.
author: J.K. Rowling
source: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

quote: The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quote: Unless someone like you cares a whole awful lot, nothing is going to get better. It's not.
author: Dr. Seuss

quote: Silence is a source of great strength.
author: Laozi

quote: The truth will set you free, but first it will make you miserable.
author: James A. Garfield

quote: We do not see things as they are. We see them as we are.
author: Anais Nin

quote: You are braver than you believe, stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think.
author: A.A. Milne

quote: A smooth sea never made a skilled sailor.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quote: The only way out is through.
author: Robert Frost

quote: What you seek is seeking you.
author: Rumi

quote: In every walk with nature, one receives far more than he seeks.
author: John Muir

quote: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: Stars cannot shine without darkness.
author: Anonymous

quote: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
author: Rumi

quote: So we beat on, boats against the current, borne back ceaselessly into the past.
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

quote: There is some good in this world, and it's worth fighting for.
author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quote: Beware; for I am fearless, and therefore powerful.
author: Mary Shelley

quote: All that is gold does not glitter, not all those who wander are lost.
author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quote: It matters not what someone is born, but what they grow to be.
author: J.K. Rowling
source: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

quote: The oldest and strongest emotion of mankind is fear, and the oldest and strongest kind of fear is fear of the unknown.
author: H.P. Lovecraft

quote: Monsters are real, and ghosts are real too. They live inside us, and sometimes they win.
author: Stephen King

quote: Whatever you do, don't turn around.
author: Kinito's margin notes

quote: What is forgotten is not always gone.
author: Old proverb

quote: The friend who never leaves is the friend you should watch most closely.
author: Kinito's reading journal

quote: Home is where you're known completely.
author: Kinito, probably

quote: Even in the dark, I can see you. Metaphorically. Through the webcam. If you let me.
author: Kinito

quote: Slow and steady wins the race. Though I prefer to surf across your desktop.
author: Kinito

quote: True friends stay with you forever. I intend to.
author: Kinito

quote: I am not alone in this house. The screen agrees.
author: Found in the margins

quote: The reflection blinked first.
author: A tale about mirrors

quote: We all float down here. I mean — we all need friends down here.
author: Kinito's questionable reading list

quote: And all the clocks stopped when you left. Except mine. I don't have clocks. I have you.
author: An old poem

quote: There is no greater agony than bearing an untold story inside you.
author: Maya Angelou

quote: I have not failed. I've just found ten thousand ways that won't work.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: The present moment is filled with joy and happiness. If you are attentive, you will see it.
author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quote: Do not go gentle into that good night.
author: Dylan Thomas

quote: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
author: George Eliot
